case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. NOAH AUTO TECH, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NOAH AUTO TECH, INC. KIM, ANTHONY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-09-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-24-2004
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAR-15-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOAH AUTO TECH, INC. KIM, ANTHONY

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOAH AUTO TECH, INC. KIM, ANTHONY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE LEASED EQUIPMENT, MARKET VALUE OF $ 2,500.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,118.47 DAMAGES, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $390.50 COSTS, $144.04 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,003.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $390.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NOAH AUTO TECH, INC. KIM, ANTHONY
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY COURT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD. ( EVID CODE 1521, 1550 ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
